scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: concurrently -g -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run lint:backend" "npm run lint:frontend"
scripts.lint:fix: concurrently -g -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "cd backend && npm run lint:fix" "cd frontend && npm run lint:fix"
scripts.format: prettier --write "./*.{json,js,md,yml}" && cd backend && npm run format && cd ../frontend && npm run format
scripts.typecheck: concurrently -g -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "cd backend && npm run typecheck" "cd frontend && npm run typecheck"
scripts.test: concurrently -g -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "cd backend && npm run test" "cd frontend && npm run test"
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.clean: cd backend && npm run clean && cd ../frontend && rm -rf .next
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../frontend && npm install
